projects.name: Blue and Pink spell comic
projects.description: 4 panel comic about Blue casting a spell on Pink that heals his horn

goals.description: write a 4 panel comic about Blue casting a spell on Pink that heals his horn

preferences.description: friendship and emotional themes in the comic

projects.name: Xid and Thanatos comic
projects.description: comic where a spell heals a horn instead of granting power

goals.description: simplify and make the Xid and Thanatos comic funnier

preferences.description: keep the core punchline about healing the horn

projects.name: study group monster comic
projects.description: comic about monsters studying for a test

goals.description: write a clickbait YouTube title for the study group monster comic

preferences.description: clickbait title that highlights humor in the final panel

projects.name: rebellion scene
projects.description: scene with Mei defending Ao Lie to a lieutenant

goals.description: rewrite the confrontation scene to mix danger and comedy

preferences.description: underlying sense of danger but somewhat comedic

projects.name: prison scene
projects.description: scene where Ao Lie is mistaken for Bai Long Ma and bitten by a spider demon guard

goals.description: depict Ao Lie's desperation and poisoning in prison

constraints.description: must include spider demon guard biting Ao Lie and leaving him weak

projects.name: village roundup scene
projects.description: scene where Wukong orders soldiers to round up monkeys and decides fate of MK and Macaque

goals.description: write the scene of Wukong deciding what to do with MK and Macaque

constraints.description: must include Wukong saying he cannot kill Macaque and being undecided about MK
